arts.ttl: Signing for Man City was a dream move but two years later I was telling people not to do it
arts.sum: Jack Rodwell played for Man City and Everton but his move from Goodison Park to the Etihad didn't work out as planned

arts.ttl: Former Man City player Benjani Mwaruwari challenges ruling in bid to lead Zimbabwe soccer federation
arts.sum: Former Zimbabwe international Benjani still has a chance, however, through an appeals committee of the federation. But an ethics committee of the association on Monday didn’t include the 46-year-old among those eligible to contest the January elections, without immediately giving a reason.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland transfer latest: Manchester City update as striker lays groundwork for exit, Pep Guardiola defends star
arts.sum: Erling Haaland is laying the groundwork to leave Manchester City, with the striker moaning at his side's form this season.

arts.ttl: Manchester City are given a boost in pursuit of '£124m-rated' Florian Wirtz as Bayer Leverkusen CEO admits 'it will be difficult' to keep playmaker this summer - with Real Madrid and Bayern Munich among his suitors too
arts.sum: Leverkusen are determined to keep hold of their prize asset that they are said to value at £124million but a recent development may force the club to reconsider.

arts.ttl: Manchester City transfer latest: Real Madrid star rejected summer move to Pep Guardiola, Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City's latest rejection is revealed after a Real Madrid star is said to have turned down a move to the Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes plea as Man City Christmas tradition is broken: 'It is our job'
arts.sum: The reigning Premier League champions are in a dire run of form

arts.ttl: Premier League GW18 predictions: Man City return to winning ways as Man United falter again
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Peter Hooton of The Farm for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 18 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola leaves and Premier League winners: Pundits predict Man City end of season outcome
arts.sum: Manchester City are in a difficult spot as they head into the traditional Boxing Day fixtures on Thursday afternoon

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca delivers Man City title race verdict Pep Guardiola will love
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City move as Pep Guardiola's former assistant is refusing to rule out his former club in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: “City’s poor run is on everyone and not just Haaland”
arts.sum: The Catalan coach gave his players a couple of days off to work off before returning to work at Christmas before starting to prepare for the Boxing Day clash with Everton . After defeat to Aston Villa last weekend, City will spend Christmas in seventh place and are currently out of a European place.
